This Weekend · Memorial Day 2026

Memorial Day in Watch Hill & Westerly

A local's three-day guide — from the historic Westerly-Pawcatuck Parade to the beach season's opening day, with where to be when and a few quieter moments worth seeking out.

  • 9:30 AM Monday — Parade steps off
  • Wilcox Park ceremony at 11
  • Beaches officially open

Read the full guide → · 8 min read
